é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,33,312,36) Mixed Language Document
Section 1: English content about document processing systems.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,83,297,11) The PDF format was developed by Adobe in the early 1990s.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,109,386,11) Table extraction requires understanding both visual layout and logical structure.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,134,249,11) Performance: 593 pages/min on modern hardware.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,160,289,11) Section 2: Technical specifications and API documentation.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,185,307,11) The parse_pdf() function accepts a path and Config parameter.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,211,356,11) Returns DocumentIR containing PageIR, BlockIR, TableIR, and ImageIR.
é¡µ=1 bbox=(31,236,270,11) Memory usage: peak 184MB for a 100-page document.
